action.reasoning: Observation: Iter 25 printed checkpoint keys showing DoubleConvResidual structure (up4.conv.residual.weight, etc.) matching current model.py. Previous ensemble (6 models) gave rmse_z500=426.9984. Predict.py already includes 10 checkpoints. Analysis: Loading test needed to confirm all checkpoint compatibility. If successful, ensemble of up to 10 models may further reduce rmse_z500. Decision: Run a quick loading test to verify checkpoints, then submit eval in same iteration to potentially improve the best metric. Remaining time ~18min, 4 iterations.
action.command:
python -c "
from model import WeatherUNet
import torch, os
paths = [
    'logs/iter_14/best_model.pt',
    'logs/iter_14/checkpoint_epoch3.pt',
    'logs/iter_14/checkpoint_epoch4.pt',
    'logs/iter_14/checkpoint_epoch2.pt',
    'logs/iter_14/checkpoint_epoch1.pt',
    'logs/iter_8/best_model.pt',
    'logs/iter_8/checkpoint_epoch5.pt',
    'logs/iter_8/checkpoint_epoch10.pt',
    'logs/iter_12/best_model.pt',
    'logs/iter_12/last_model.pt',
]
for p in paths:
    if not os.path.exists(p):
        print(f'MISS {p}')
        continue
    try:
        ckpt = torch.load(p, map_location='cpu')
        sd = ckpt.get('model_state_dict', ckpt)
        sh = sd['inc.conv1.weight'].shape
        base = sh[0]; inch = sh[1]
        m = WeatherUNet(in_channels=inch, out_channels=2, base_channels=base)
        m.load_state_dict(sd, strict=True)
        print(f'OK  {p} (inch={inch}, base={base})')
    except Exception as e:
        print(f'FAIL {p}: {e}')
"
